name: apxUSD
redeem: Permissioned: only whitelisted institutions in permitted jurisdictions can mint or redeem apxUSD directly for USDC (via liquidation of preferred share collateral). General users exit through secondary markets and DEX liquidity pools; liquidity may be thin and limited outside traditional trading hours. apyUSD (yield wrapper) requires a ~20-day unlock cooldown to convert back to apxUSD. Not available to US, EU, or EEA persons.
notes: Synthetic dollar backed by offchain DAT preferred shares (e.g., Strategy STRC). Overcollateralized with PCAOB-registered audit attestations (Wolf & Company), daily NAV dashboards, and audits by Zellic, Certora, Quantstamp. Token contract is UUPS upgradeable with pause and denylist controls. Supported by publicly-listed DeFi Development Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV). Key concerns: permissioned exit, geo-restrictions, equity-based collateral correlated to Bitcoin, and early-stage secondary liquidity.
